chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3722 of 2018 CP D 3723 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 28.03.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Azad Khan, advocate files Vakalatnama of Mr. Faheem Raza, advocate on behalf of respondent, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel, notices have been issued herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks for notices to be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petitions be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
